case_title: HARRISON, NAIM THOMAS et al VS ADAMS, PAUL W.

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS ORDERED DESTROYED
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARRISON, NAIM THOMAS HARRISON, MARIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ADAMS, PAUL W. $4,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $109.94 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,809.94, JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 26672 ON 10-4-01. EXHIBITS RETURNED IN SMALL CLAIMS COURT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT ADAMS, PAUL W. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT HARRISON, NAIM THOMAS HARRISON, MARIE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $4,650.00 FILED BY ADAMS, PAUL W. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT HARRISON, NAIM THOMAS HARRISON, MARIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-27-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARRISON, NAIM THOMAS HARRISON, MARIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ADAMS, PAUL W. $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00, IT IS THE COURT'S INTENT THAT THE JUDGMENT BE SATISFIED FROM CHICAGO TITLE ESCROW #8501622 AND THAT THE REMAINING FUNDS HELD IN ESCROW BE RETURNED TO PLAINTIFFS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT ADAMS, PAUL W. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT HARRISON, NAIM THOMAS HARRISON, MARIE SEE ABOVE TERMS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERTIFIED MAILING TO MARIE HARRISON RETURNED TO COURT: UNCLAIMED.
CERTIFIED MAILING TO NAIM THOMAS HARRISON RETURNED TO COURT: UNCLAIMED.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
DEFT. FILING FOR MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION, PAID $ 14.00 CASH, TOLD TO WAIT AT LEAST 15 DAYS.MAILED COPIES. FOLDER FOR COMMISSIONER.
DEFT'S REQUEST FOR RECONSIDERATION GRANTED. COURT ORDERED JUDGMENT TO BE AMENDED.
COURT ORDER: THE JUDGMENT IS AMENDED TO REFLECT THE COURT'S ORIGINAL INTENT. JUDGMENT IS IN FAVOR OF PLTFS (HARRISON) & AGAINST DEFT (ADAMS)
IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,000.00 & NO COURT COSTS. IT IS THE COURT'S INTENT THAT THE JUDGMENT BE SATISFIED FROM CHICAGO TITLE ESCROW #8501622 & THAT THE
REMAINING FUNDS HELD IN ESCROW BE RETURNED TO DEFT
COMMENTS: THE COURT APOLOGIZES TO THE PARTIES FOR THE DELAY IN RULING ON DEFT'S MOTION TO CORRECT THE JUDGMENT. DEFT'S MOTION "SLIPPED THROUGH THE
CRACKS" & WAS NOT RECEIVED FOR RULING UNTIL 7/13/01. THE COURT IS SORRY FOR ANY INCONVENIENCE CAUSE TO ANY PARTY OR TO CHICAGO TITLE.
PLAINTIFF NAIM THOMAS HARRISON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT TO BE SUBMITTED TO THE COMMISS- IONER AFTER 15 DAYS. FILED.
PLFT'S REQUEST TO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT: DENIED BY COMMISSIONER. NOTICED SENT TO ALL PARTIES.
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARRISON, NAIM THOMAS
